subcodes.first_line: God maketh mention of His servant that he may rejoice within his soul and be detached from all created things. Say: Through His remembrance do they who affirm His unity drink deep [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عبده لیفرح فی نفسه و ینقطع عن الاکوان قل ان بذکره یشربون الموحدون
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
